reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report it back in the chat interface.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut home screen with agents listed in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260625-235601-wynl" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened successfully showing chat interface with input box
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was sent and a new session "Browser Navigation and Page Title" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent processed the request and returned complete response within approximately 31 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is 'Example Domain'." and confirms "The page at https://example.com has the title 'Example Domain'." All browser tools executed successfully (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser)
